description: Determines the specific effect for Control spell types. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the specific effect for Control spell types. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.

entries.result: Enhance control of something already being manually controlled, such as guiding a fired arrow or swung sword
